$comment: V2 AI-UI capability model. Concrete UI definitions for the real V1 capabilities, each conforming to ui-definition.schema.json. Derived ONLY from V1 behaviour sources (feature hooks, contracts, e2e/persona-registry.json, e2e/ui-contract.json, e2e/scenario-manifest.json, ADMIN_NAV_ITEMS, i18n keys), never from V1 JSX styling. The V2 generator consumes this; it must never read old JSX.

tasks.summary: See actor identity and entry points (admin, status, tool links).

personas.notes: Login refused for disabled Keycloak account.

tasks.summary: Begin IdP-brokered sign-in; users never see Keycloak chrome.

personas.notes: manager can read/invite/update_role per persona perms but lacks tenant.admin.access nav.

tasks.summary: View tenant members with username, role, status, last login.
Invite a new member by email with a role.
Remove a member (confirmed; last-admin guard server-side).
Edit a member's username from the expanded row.
List a member's linked external identities (lazy).

keyboard: Invite/remove dialogs trap and restore focus.

readiness.degradedBehaviour: Show per-capability degraded badge with server reason.

tasks.summary: List composed-provider clickthrough services and open them.

personas.notes: quota at/over limit must be visible with stable reason.
rate-limit denial must be visible with stable reason.

tasks.summary: View API keys / PATs and rate limits.
View event bus / queue / DLQ activity.
List scheduled jobs and their last run.

keyboard: Delete confirmation traps and restores focus

fieldErrors.name: A group with this name already exists

keyboardBehaviour: Create is reachable and activatable by keyboard
The create form submits on Enter
Delete confirmation auto-focuses the confirm action and is keyboard-operable

errorPresentation.fieldError: react-aria FieldError associated to the input
